question.question_text: What will the USD/CHF exchange rate be on 2026-03-26 (or the next available trading day)?

prediction.reasoning: For a one-day ahead forecast of a major currency pair like USD/CHF, the best point estimate is the current rate (random walk hypothesis). Daily exchange rate changes are typically very small, with USD/CHF having a historical daily volatility of roughly 0.4-0.6%. Using approximately 0.5% daily volatility (about 0.004 in absolute terms at this rate level), I construct confidence intervals: 50% CI covers roughly ±0.67 standard deviations (~±0.0014), 80% CI covers roughly ±1.28 standard deviations (~±0.0026), and 90% CI covers roughly ±1.645 standard deviations (~±0.0034). The next trading day is 2026-03-26 (Thursday), a regular weekday.
